nasb.text: So they camped one over against the other seven days. And on the seventh day the battle was joined, and the sons of Israel killed of the Arameans 100,000 foot soldiers in one day.

esv.text: And they encamped opposite one another seven days. Then on the seventh day the battle was joined. And the people of Israel struck down of the Syrians 100,000 foot soldiers in one day.

cnv.text: 以色列人和亞蘭人相對安營，共七天。到了第七日，兩軍終於接戰了。那一天，以色列人殺了亞蘭人步兵十萬。

ccb.text: 以色列人和亚兰人两军对峙，一连七天。第七天，两军交战，以色列军一天杀了十万亚兰步兵，
